test.query: INSERT INTO codec_lq_none_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_lq_lq2_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_lq_lq4_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_lq_lq8_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_lq_lz4_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_lq_fpc_{type} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
